title: Resolution Authorizing the Honorable Mayor Antonio L. Kalaw in Behalf of the Municipal Government of Los Baños (MGLB) to Accept the Deed of Donation Being Made by the Provincial Government of Laguna for One (1) Unit Desktop Computer with Operating System Amounting to Thirty Thousand Eight Hundred Pesos (P30,800.00). (AUTHOR: HON. GERONIMO A. CICERON, 03/15/2021)
